title: Celtics stay top of the Promotional League
description: GEORGE NEWS - The spirited Celtics Football...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The spirited Celtics Football Club defeated France United FC 1-0 in a Promotional League fixture on Saturday afternoon, 6 July at the Lawaaikamp Stadium. The only goal of the game was netted by Yamnkela Poswayo of Celtics FC.


> With 43 points, Celtics is currently sitting comfortably at the top of the table.


The Celtics boys have played 17 fixtures with 14 victories, one draw, and they have lost two games, while France United is battling for the top eight positions. Celtics FC player Yamnkela Poswayo gave a stellar performance steering the game and creating more chances for his side.

The Promotional/Development League log leaders Celtics FC started the game on the left side of the field - delivering a powerful strike straight to France United goalkeeper Zenande Xayimpi.

Celtics were looking very smart on the ball employing their pace to break through the France United defenders. They were all square in the first half with both teams failing to break the net.

France United were quick on the ball at the beginning of the second half. Celtics took the match from France United attacking on the flanks, and Yamnkela Poswayo netted the only goal of the game. France United replied with positive moves looking for the equalising goal, but in their attempts for the goal, the ball hit the woodwork twice.

The teams played out an epic battle, but on both sides, inaccuracy to utilise the chances was their downfall. The game ended 1-0 with Celtics FC extending their lead on top after collecting maximum points.

Promotional League results

Burning Fire 2-1 George Celtics

Spurs United 2-0 Vista

Future Stars 5-0 Tigers

France United 0-1 Celtics

Southern Academy vs Young Masters - Young Masters failed to honour the game

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
